short answer: yes, though in mrms context "reincarnation" is (re)awakening

long answer: in the books Murphy is Tulu's biological daughter and was given birth in secret solely to rebirth Tulu using her womb when he died
GTulu calling her his princess is both a reference to Murphy's role in the book (born by Tulu to rebirth him) and a reference to how Awakeners are linked: Awakeners with same Genesis is like having the same bloodline

So fun little fact I found: the game is actually technically from mainland (company and studio are there)
but the devs and company used a loophole so that they're published as a game from HK and can avoid censorship since they're not published in CN

basically cn laws are "do what you want if it's not shown and promoted here", so the only laws that apply to the game are from HK
all of this to make the game as they wished 😭 I wonder how it used to be like 10 years ago, because iirc the laws became tougher fairly recently in retrospect?

I heard they wanted to try expanding to cn at some point (with a different censored version for mainland), but it would have required soooooo much stuff being censored for that separate version that they put it on hold indefinitely, since they didn't want to do it
I can't imagine the story being the story without all these elements tbh, so there's probably not much they can do in that regard
